title: Agent 一次做太多，留下烂摊子
title_en: Agent Tries to Do Too Much at Once

body.problem: 没有约束时，agent 倾向于"一次性实现"整个应用。这导致 context window 在实现到一半时耗尽，下一个 session 接手的是半成品、没有文档的代码——既不能运行，也不知道做到哪里。
body.solution: 在 prompt 中强制要求：① 每次 session 只实现功能清单中的一个功能；② 实现后用浏览器自动化工具做端到端测试（像真实用户一样操作）；③ 测试通过后 git commit（附描述性 commit message）；④ 更新进度文件后再结束 session。
body.keyTakeaway: "干净收尾"的标准：代码无重大 bug、有文档、可以 merge 到主分支。每次 session 结束时要达到这个标准，而不是"做得差不多"。

body_en.problem: Without constraints, agents try to one-shot an entire application. The context window runs out mid-implementation, leaving the next session with half-built, undocumented code that neither runs nor clearly explains what was attempted.
body_en.solution: Prompt the agent to: ① implement only one feature per session from the feature list; ② test end-to-end using browser automation (as a real user would, not just unit tests or curl); ③ git commit with a descriptive message after tests pass; ④ update the progress file before ending the session.
body_en.keyTakeaway: "Clean state" means: no major bugs, well-documented code, mergeable to main. Each session must end at this bar — not "mostly done." Git history becomes a safety net the agent can use to revert bad changes.
